hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, subprocess, re, os
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
file = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if file and re.search(r'\\.(ts|tsx)$', file) and os.path.exists(file):
    result = subprocess.run(['grep', '-n', 'console\\.log', file], capture_output=True, text=True)
    if result.stdout:
        print(f'[Hook] console.log detected in {os.path.basename(file)} — remove before commit', file=sys.stderr)
        for line in result.stdout.strip().split('\\n')[:3]:
            print(f'  {line}', file=sys.stderr)
"
